name: Namphueng Khom
overview: Kangsadarn is a young woman whose mother's past behaviour will come back to haunt them both. Twenty years ago, Rose was in love with a poor, young man named Purim but she brutally hurt him and never saw him again. Purim, on the other hand, has never forgotten the pain inflicted upon him by Rose and has spent the last twenty years obsessed with revenge.

trailers.title: Teaser น้ำผึ้งขม
